app_description: A Pomodoro-style focus timer that helps you build deep work habits with streak tracking and ambient sounds

personas.name: Sophia
personas.description: 24-year-old woman with shoulder-length brown hair, warm brown eyes, friendly smile. Often wears casual but put-together outfits — white tees, cozy sweaters, simple jewelry.
personas.image_prompt_prefix: Portrait photo of a 24-year-old woman with shoulder-length brown hair, warm brown eyes, friendly smile, natural skin texture

writing_style.vocabulary: casual gen-z, uses 'literally', 'game changer', 'trust me on this'

personas.name: Marcus
personas.description: 27-year-old man with short dark hair, clean-shaven, athletic build. Wears simple dark t-shirts, hoodies. Confident but approachable.
personas.image_prompt_prefix: Portrait photo of a 27-year-old man with short dark hair, clean-shaven, athletic build, confident expression, natural skin

writing_style.vocabulary: casual but punchy, uses 'bro', 'let me put you on', 'this is it'

personas.name: Emma
personas.description: 22-year-old woman with long dark hair, glasses, studious look. Wears oversized sweaters, sits in cozy spaces. Bookish aesthetic.
personas.image_prompt_prefix: Portrait photo of a 22-year-old woman with long dark hair, round glasses, gentle expression, bookish aesthetic, natural skin

writing_style.vocabulary: articulate but accessible, uses 'honestly', 'here's the thing', 'I wish I knew this sooner'

pricing.paid_tier: Unlimited sessions, all ambient sounds, streak analytics, custom timers
